title: ilex qianlingshanensis
intro: Ilex qianlingshanensis, also known as the Qianling Mountain Holly or Qilian Holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae, native to the mountains of China. Traditionally, the leaves of Ilex qianlingshanensis have been used in Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and promoting cardiovascular health. Ilex qianlingshanensis is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its dried leaves and fruits are used in traditional Chinese medicine formulations to treat various ailments.
